nodes.label: AI as communication aid for phrasing and wording
nodes.grounding_span: helping to phrase an email or how to best word a title or a slide

nodes.label: AI as technical problem-solving tool for code and formulas
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding instructions leading to frustration
nodes.grounding_span: help write code or formulae for whatever tool I'm using

nodes.label: AI as learning aid for understanding solutions
nodes.grounding_span: I asked for more clarification on how it was actually working as well so I understood the formula itself

nodes.label: AI for creative and personal expression tasks
nodes.grounding_span: certain creative tasks like jokes, good one liners for slides

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy in data interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: AI is pretty bad at interpreting data and analysing it and spitting goood stuff out that isn't hallucinated/wrong

nodes.label: Maintaining human expertise alongside AI use
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: maintaining those skills are still super important

nodes.label: Authentic self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: doesn't sound like something I would say so it doesn't feel genuine

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It saves a lot of time

nodes.label: Deep understanding and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't have found my exact solution on google but now I can get my exact solution and an exact description of why it's working

nodes.label: Competence and control
nodes.grounding_span: we would still want experts to understand what the AI is doing

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for technical problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: the solution was correct right away

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misunderstanding instructions
nodes.grounding_span: I was getting frustrated because I was telling teh AI over and over to just move the content

nodes.label: Preference for human creativity in personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to not take the help there and work with it myself

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: once that's figured out. i will be using for that use case for sure

nodes.label: Commitment to maintaining human skills
nodes.grounding_span: maintaining those skills are still super important

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with selective incorporation
nodes.grounding_span: I write it in my words first and then feed it to the AI and then let it come up with a better version

nodes.label: Preference for fresh start when stuck
nodes.grounding_span: I usually start out a new conversation if I'm honest or just do the work without AI
